# programs.desktoppr

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.desktoppr`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.desktoppr.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable managing the desktop picture/wallpaper on macOS using desktoppr. |
| `programs.desktoppr.package` | `package` | The desktoppr package to use. |
| `programs.desktoppr.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of anything` | The settings to set for desktoppr. |
| `programs.desktoppr.settings.color` | `string matching the pattern [0-9a-fA-F]{6}` | The background color that will be used behind the chosen picture when it does not fill the screen. |
| `programs.desktoppr.settings.picture` | `null or absolute path or string matching the pattern ^http(s)?://.*$` | The path to the desktop picture/wallpaper to set. Can also be an HTTP or HTTPS URL to retrieve the picture from a remote URL at runtime. |
| `programs.desktoppr.settings.scale` | `one of "fill", "stretch", "center", "fit"` | The scaling behavior to use when using an image. |
| `programs.desktoppr.settings.setOnlyOnce` | `boolean` | If false (the default), the desktop picture/wallpaper will be reset to the configured parameters on every system configuration change. If true, the desktop picture/wallpaper will only be set when it differs from the one previously set. This allows the user to manually change the desktop picture/wallpaper after it has been set. |
| `programs.desktoppr.settings.sha256` | `null or string matching the pattern ^[a-f0-9]{64}$` | An optional SHA256 checksum of the desktop picture/wallpaper. If the specified file does not match the checksum, it will not be set. |
